Contracting Authority: Zentraldienst der Polizei des Landes Brandenburg (ZDPol), Am Baruther Tor 20, 15806 Zossen
Project Description:
- Procurement of a SAP-integrated Fleet Management System incl. electronic logbook (software + services)
- In-SAP tool (ERP 6.0 EHP7, NW 7.4 on HANA 2.0), S/4HANA-ready; no batch/sync solution
- Deliver: installation on DEV/QAS/PRD + sandbox; migration; ops/security/privacy docs; training; 5-year maintenance & support
- Scope: manage 3,500–5,000 vehicles; service card integration; manual entry; reporting; pool mgmt; mobile app (iOS)
- Timeline: start 01.07.2024; production-ready ≤3 months; parallel run until 2024/25; S/4HANA target end 2025
Important Dates:
- Questions deadline: 09/04/2024 23:59 (UTC+2)
- Public opening: 18/04/2024 12:05 (Zossen)
- Bid validity: 60 days; bind until 17/06/2024

Scope & Requirements.Scope & Requirements:
Lot 1 — SAP integrated fleet management system incl. electronic logbook
- Deliverables:
  - SAP-integrated FPMS + electronic logbook; installation on DEV/TEST/TRAIN/PRD + sandbox; S/4HANA-compatible and supported during later upgrade
  - Data migration: all active or current-year retired vehicles; movements (km/hours), fuelings, consumables
  - Ops/Security/Privacy documentation (per ZDPol IT-Security/Datenschutz); handouts; training on SAP training system
  - Maintenance & support: 5 years after go-live
- Key functional requirements:
  - Vehicle mgmt for ≥3,500–5,000 vehicles (as SAP Equipment): fields incl. manufacturer, type, model, FIN, ≥1 plate, status, year, km/hours, fuel/energy, seats, payload, weight, link to equipment, nav yes/no, service card mapping
  - Assignments: ≥1 driver/passengers; fixed owning org unit; inter-station transfers; owner: Land Brandenburg
  - Service card integration (market-standard interfaces): import provider data (monthly, file by ≤10th); exchange fueling/charging/services data; updatable commodity catalog; auto pre-posting of monthly invoice to SAP; manual schedule; review & release in SAP
  - Manual entry (exceptions): plate/Pol-ID, date, qty, UoM (L, KG), commodity, payment type, total/unit price, comment
  - Electronic/paper logbook: capture trip (start/end date/time, duration, start/end odometer, route, purpose, fuels/charges, consumables, services; optional e-signature)
  - Pool mgmt: criteria-driven selection (distance, persons, vehicle type/equipment, fueling/charging, status)
  - Reporting (min.): consumption/costs—Soll/Ist/Rest per vehicle type/vehicle/fueling type/OE/driver; auto cross-check vs. km; all logbook data queryable; service-card reporting by commodity, services, vehicle, card, date/time, qty, cost, days-in-use
  - Electronic logbook access: SAP web app + mobile app (Apple iOS)
- Process & integration:
  - Support current FPMS process (Anlage 1); use SAP master data; no standalone/batch-only solution
  - PerIS feed for persons (unidirectional); persons handled as SAP Equipment
- Quality & usability:
  - Full German UI/help/docs; provide free demo/probe version (full features) ≥30 days for usability test with ≥10 AG users; use-case scripts provided; scoring 0/5/10 per question (max 140 → 10 points)
- Non-functional & SLAs:
  - Service window: Mon–Fri 08:00–18:00
  - Priority SLAs (max): very high—react ≤4h, fix ≤24h; high—react ≤4h, fix ≤48h; medium—react ≤24h, deliver ≤1 week; low—react ≤48h, deliver ≤4 weeks
  - Language for all services: German (min. C1)
  - Onsite possible at ZDPol; Remote via ZIT-BB standard key (contractor bears setup effort)
- Timeline & milestones:
  - Start intro 01.07.2024; production readiness ≤3 months; parallel run old/new until 2024/25
  - Milestones: preparation; install/test/document; remediation/pilot ops/training; rollout & Hypercare (~4 weeks)
- Additional constraints:
  - Provide 120 person-days (ceiling) for introducing electronic logbook (call-off until end of support; no obligation to call)
  - Changes must be audit-proof (revisionssicher)
  - Staff willing to undergo BbgSÜG security screening Stufe 1 upon request
Scope & Requirements.Contract Volume:
- Price sheet (indicative quantities): 25 PT installation; 10 PT ops docs; 20 PT handouts/training; 20 PT S/4HANA re-introduction; 120 PT electronic logbook intro; maintenance & support: 5 years (lump sum)
- Fleet size: 3,500–5,000 vehicles
Scope & Requirements.Place of Performance:
- Diensträume der Polizei Brandenburg (hauptsächlich ZDPol, Am Baruther Tor 20, 15806 Zossen)
- Remote via ZIT-BB standard solution (after coordination)
Scope & Requirements.Standards & Certifications:
- EVB-IT Erstellungsvertrag + EVB-IT Erstellungs-AGB; VOL/B; ZVB-Bbg; AGB ZDPol (01.05.2022)
- GDPR/DSGVO (Art. 28 AV-Vertrag); BbgDSG; E-Invoicing required
- Russia sanctions: VO (EU) Nr. 833/2014 Art. 5k compliance (>10% subcontractor threshold)
- Language: German C1 for all deliverables
- Security: BbgSÜG Stufe 1 readiness; ZDPol Confidentiality & Teleservice agreements
Scope & Requirements.Subcontracting & Consortia:
- Bietergemeinschaften allowed (joint/several liability; E2); name lead member
- Subcontractors allowed (E3); prior approval for changes; E5 on request; V5 minimum-wage compliance
- Eignungsleihe per §47 VgV (identify relied capacities)
- Brandenburg minimum wage: 13.00 EUR/h; audit/tracking & penalties apply
Scope & Requirements.Forms & e-Submission:
- Electronic submission only via Vergabemarktplatz Brandenburg: https://vergabemarktplatz.brandenburg.de/VMPSatellite/notice/CXSDYYDY1SDD83TD
- Accepted signatures: Textform (§126b BGB), qualified, advanced
- Not allowed: email/fax
- Include: signed Angebotsdeckblatt; Teil D Preisblatt_FPMSYS; completed Teil B (incl. Annexes); Bewertungsmatrix; Grobkonzept (≤5 pages); demo access for 30 days

Offer Submission Documents: Angebotsdeckblatt inkl. Unterschrift in Textform (§126b BGB)
Grobkonzept zur Einführung (max. 5 DIN A4 Seiten)
Zugang zur Demo/Probeversion (≥30 Tage, volles Feature-Set)
Wartungs- und Supportbeschreibung (Kap. 5) als separates Dokument
List of Documents: E12 Erklärung Betriebs-/Berufshaftpflichtversicherung (≥1,000,000 EUR je Fall)

Economic & Financial Standing.Turnover in Comparable Services: Angabe Gesamt- und vergleichbarer Umsatz 2021–2023 (EUR, netto) im Formular E1

Legal & Registration.Self-declarations (GWB §§123/124 or equi: Gefordert in E1 (u.a. Steuern/Abgaben, keine Ausschlussgründe, MiLoG §19, keine Wettbewerbsverstöße)
Legal & Registration.Subcontractor Identification & Reliance: Unterauftragnehmer/Eignungsleihe in E3 benennen; E5/V5 auf Anforderung; Zustimmung AG für Wechsel erforderlich

Technical & Professional Ability.Personnel Profiles:
- SAP Consultants/Developers with experience in: SAP ERP 6.0 EHP7 (FI, FI-AA, CO, PSM, MM/PUR/IM, PM), S/4HANA readiness, interfaces, jobs, authorizations, forms (SAP Script/Adobe/SmartForms), customizing, reporting
- Skills: FPMS/process integration, service-card provider interfaces, electronic logbook (web/iOS), data migration (equipments, movements), German C1 (spoken/written)
- Security: BbgSÜG Stufe 1 screening readiness; comply with ZIT-BB remote access key
- Documentation & training capability (handouts, test, training on SAP training system)
Technical & Professional Ability.Headcount / Staffing:
- Provide sufficient capacity incl. Ad hoc support beyond baseline
- Onsite work possible in Zossen; remote after coordination; ~20 trainees per onsite session
Technical & Professional Ability.Reference Projects:
- Minimum 3 reference projects within last 3 financial years
- Comparable scope: SAP-integrated fleet/vehicle data mgmt, fuel/charge card integration, logbook, reporting, migration
- State per reference: client (public/private), scope/tasks, value (EUR, net), % self-performance, period (from/to), contact email

Company Referrals: - Company-level references: ≥3 in last 3 years; similar SAP-integrated FPMS/e-logbook/service-card integrations; include client, scope, volume (EUR), timeline, % own work; public-sector examples preferred
Award Criteria:
- Evaluation method: UfAB simple ratio Z = L / P (L = weighted quality points; P = total evaluated price per Preisblatt)
- Weights:
  - Price: 50%
  - Quality: 50% split as:
    - Rahmenbedingungen: 7.5%
    - SAP integriertes Fuhrparkmanagementsystem: 20%
    - Gebrauchstauglichkeit: 12.5% (Usability-Test; 0–140 survey points → 0–10 eval points)
    - Leistungsanforderung (Grobkonzept etc.): 10%
- A-criteria: mandatory (exclusion on non-compliance); B-criteria: scored 0–10 with specified weights (e.g., data fields 0.25; reporting 0.1; S/4HANA effort 0.1; training docs 0.05; school concept 0.05; onsite training 0.05)
- Usability demo: free, ≥30 days, full features; test by ≥10 users using provided use-cases
